column3: Government Response Stringency Index: composite measure based on 9 response indicators including school closures, workplace closures, and travel bans, rescaled to a value from 0 to 100 (100 = strictest response)

column2: Log of people sometimes working from home
column3: sometimes: working at home less than half of the days worked, but a least one hour in a reference period of four weeks preceding the end of the reference week.

column2: Log of people usually working from home
column3: usually: working at home half of the days worked in a reference period of four weeks preceding the end of the reference week.

column2: Energy intentsity

column2: Log of real diesel price
Log of real super (petrol) price
Log of total goods loaded (t) in the region
Log of relative diesel price
column3: Relative diesel price: region-specific measure equal to the national average diesel price in the region's country divided by the weighted average diesel price in adjacent regions. Weights reflect the number of adjacent regions in each neighboring country. Larger weights are assigned to countries that account for more adjacent regions.

column2: Indicator variable.
column3: 1: if a region is >= 75th percentile of the cross-border commuter inflow distribution (excluding Luxembourg). 0: if below. Cross-border commuter inflow: People with workplace at the NUTS2 region but residency in another country that never work from home.

column2: Interaction term between lrel_diesel and cb_inflow75
